[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010101111 6
1 100100100 3
2 111110101 7
3 111111011 8
4 111110010 6
5 110100100 4
6 111000100 4
7 010101111 6

56 65 111111111 a
67 76 111111111 a
70 07 111111111 a

13 31 110101111 7

35 53 111111111 a
46 64 111111111 a

71 17 111111111 a

36 63 111111111 a
47 74 101111111 8
50 05 111111101 8
61 16 111111111 a
72 27 111111111 a

15 51 111110101 7 match 2
26 62 111111111 a
37 73 111111111 a
